params.name: Prehistoric Fossil
params.source:
* Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Time Chest (1.5%), Wishing (0.14%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (210k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
* [[Mosasaur]] - [[Rare Rent]]
params.description:
On Mar 22, 1990, paleontologist Susan Hendrickson discovered a fossil of T-rex in South Dakota.

Archaeologists named this fossil Sue. It is the best preserved T-rex fossil ever found. At the end of the 20th century, the Chicago's Field Museum bought it for 8.4 million dollars at Sotheby's. In the following 20 years, Sue has been the world's most expensive fossil.
